title: weapons-plus
description: This datapack adds lots of new weapons with awesome abilities into minecraft!
body:
Custom Weapons Datapack

This datapack adds a range of new weapons to Minecraft, each with its own unique ability and playstyle.

Crafting recipes can be found in the Gallery. **Make sure to download the resource pack** as well so the custom textures display correctly.

To craft the Doom Blade, the strongest weapon in the datapack, check the Gallery for full details.

For version 1.1 and above, run the command _/function allowed_weapons:settings_ to open a list of all available weapons. You can disable any weapon by unticking the checkbox next to it.

Update 1.0

Inferno’s Edge

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Damages mobs that attack you

Grants an extra 5 hearts

Applies Fire Aspect II on hit

Deals 20 damage

</details>

Bedrock Breaker

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Causes an explosion on hit

Deals 20 damage

Cannot be destroyed by explosions

</details>

Whirlwind Katana

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Grants +0.1 movement speed

Grants +10,000 safe fall distance

Deals 10 damage

</details>

Staff of Glowing

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Right-click to apply Glowing to mobs within a radius

Drains 1 XP level per second while active

</details>

Warp Dagger

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Right-click a block to create an End Gateway

When two gateways exist, they become linked

Creating a third gateway destroys the oldest one

</details>

Shadow Dagger

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Grants Invisibility while held

Reduces maximum health by 1 heart

Grants +3 attack speed

Deals 10 damage

Item is invisible in third-person view

Right-click consumes 50 XP levels and switches you to Spectator Mode for 15 seconds

</details>

Doom Blade

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Runs /kill on target

When right-clicked, fires a doom beam that kills all things in its path and destroys blocks

</details>

**Update 1.1 Boss Update**

All boss drops have a 2 percent chance of dropping from their boss.

When you wear the full set of boss armour, you gain an extra 10 hearts.

All boss pieces are unbreakable.

Ender Dragon

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Dragon Axe gives you telekinesis. Press right-click on a mob to use it, then right-click again to throw the mob away.

Dragon Chestplate functions like an elytra, but provides more protection than a netherite chestplate.

</details>

Wither

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Wither Mace explodes on impact, makes you immune to fall damage, and gives a passive wither effect to all nearby mobs.

Wither Boots give a very strong passive wither effect to nearby mobs when sneaking, and also grant immunity to the wither effect and explosions.

</details>

Warden

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

When right-clicked, the Warden Sword unleashes a sonic boom and also gives you an extra 5 hearts while holding it.

Warden Leggings give Glowing to all mobs in a large radius and make you deal twice as much damage on sculk.

</details>

Elder Guardian

<details> <summary>Spoiler</summary>

Elder Trident has chain lightning when thrown.

Guardian Boots give a passive effect to nearby mobs and grant immunity to wither.

</details>
